We are seeking an analytical, solutions-oriented Business Analyst to join our Alternative Investments Operations team at Neuberger Berman. In this critical role, you will partner with senior operations leaders, product managers, technology teams (including BPM/workflow delivery), and external service providers to drive operational efficiency, streamline business processes, and support the growth of our private equity, private debt, and alternatives platform. Your work will directly improve end-to-end investment operations through process redesign, automation, and measurable outcomes for internal stakeholders and clients.

Key Responsibilities

Collaborate with operations, product, technology, and business teams to assess current-state processes, pain points, controls, and success metrics across the alternative investment lifecycle.

Map, document, and optimize front-, middle-, and back-office workflows (e.g., swim lanes/BPMN-style where appropriate) to improve clarity, scalability, and auditability.

Identify opportunities for automation, standardization, exception management, and straight-through processing; define future-state workflows and operating models.

Elicit, refine, and translate requirements into clear delivery artifacts: business/functional specs, user stories, acceptance criteria, and process documentation.

Partner with workflow/platform teams (e.g., Appian) to define workflow behavior, business rules, routing, SLAs, exception handling, and operational controls/entitlements.

Define data and integration requirements with internal platforms and third parties (e.g., fund administrators, custodians, vendors), including APIs/events and file-based workflows when n
